bio: Software engineer based in Hamburg, currently finishing my B.Sc. in Wirtschaftsinformatik (Business Informatics) at the University of Hamburg. My focus is backend development, from microservices to infrastructure. I particularly enjoy picking up new technologies and domains. After a full academic year at San Diego State University, I returned to Hamburg to write my bachelor thesis while working as a student engineer at OTTO, helping build the next-generation product data onboarding platform.
